title: My AI strategy bough LUV right before it jumped
author: Magic-Mike-2023
selftext:
Hey everyone!  
I've created my AI strategy in [Alpha Builder](https://builder.limex.com/) on Dec 30th. The strategy shows decent results and I'm starting to trust it more and more. Last week it added LUV (Southwest Airlines) stock in the portfolio 2 days before their earnings report was released. Stock went up and again strategy proved to be good at picking stocks. Now this week it changed its tone towards LUV and based on drivers, it starts to move it down in ranking. Here is the explanation for this week:  
"The company's strengths are highlighted by strong momentum indicators, high market capitalization, and favorable valuation metrics, suggesting positive investor sentiment and growth potential. However, weak relative strength index and cautious analyst expectations indicate potential overbought conditions and uncertainty in future earnings."

I don't know exactly how it makes decision on adding removing certain stocks, but it does it well.  
If anyone has "what to buy" question, feel free to check my portfolio - [https://builder.limex.com/dashboard/103963](https://builder.limex.com/dashboard/103963)

 

https://preview.redd.it/frst3qb1ndhg1.png?width=1503&format=png&auto=webp&s=85737769f07a8322aa3f5c3dabeb8dd26e30919e

replies.author: kool_mandate
replies.body:
Here’s your tells:

Single cherry-picked winning trade

No full track record or drawdowns shown

Vague “AI” buzzwords with no detail

Holding period is statistically meaningless

Earnings timing framed as prediction

You admit you don’t understand the model

Immediate funnel link to platform

No risk metrics 

Generic factor language dressed up as AI

FOMO-driven retail marketing psychology

replies.author: Magic-Mike-2023
replies.body:
Single cherry-picked winning trade - I shared what I thought may be interesting. Other trades were ok, nothing that would grab my attention.  
No full track record or drawdowns shown - that's why I left a link, go and check if you interested  
Vague “AI” buzzwords with no detail - was I suppose to write an article?   
...  
You admit you don’t understand the model - I understand certain things because I set up settings, but result comes from the a black box. And some it's decisions are hard to explain

Immediate funnel link to platform - because you not familiar with the product. If I'd leave link to Seeking Alpha or TradingView, then you probably won't ask this question, right?  
...

  
I could also say that your comment is just a regular hater post.
